critical_audit_matters.matter: Deferred Revenue Related to Loyalty Program
critical_audit_matters.description: Actuarially determined liability based on anticipated timing of future point redemptions including breakage estimate
critical_audit_matters.why_critical: Subjectivity of breakage assumption required actuarial specialists

critical_audit_matters.description: Reporting unit within management and franchising segment carrying value exceeded fair value
critical_audit_matters.why_critical: Significant assumptions in projected future cash flows, discount rate, capitalization rate

revenue_recognition.policy: Revenue recognized when control transferred to customer
revenue_recognition.franchise_fees: Initial franchise fees combined with royalty fees, deferred and recognized over expected customer life (typically initial term)
revenue_recognition.royalty_fees: Sales-based fees recognized over time as services rendered, payable monthly
revenue_recognition.system_wide_services: Fund model — assessment fee billed monthly, combined with IP access as single performance obligation; break-even intent over time
revenue_recognition.loyalty_program: Assessment fees deferred until member redeems points; single performance obligation combining program administration and award redemptions

useful_lives.leasehold_improvements: Shorter of lease term or useful life

depreciation.impairment_policy: Quarterly assessment; undiscounted cash flow test; if carrying value exceeds projected undiscounted cash flows, fair value determined via DCF, appraisals, or broker valuations

income_taxes.approach: Asset/liability method; deferred taxes for temporary differences
income_taxes.uncertain_tax_positions: Accrued interest and penalties recognized as income tax expense
income_taxes.IRS_matter: Estimated additional income tax payment of $280M for years 2012-2024 including $46M estimated interest
income_taxes.Mexico_assessment: Additional corporate income tax assumed through prior acquisition
income_taxes.effective_tax_rate_2024_note: 17.1% vs 21% statutory (elevated gains on real estate sales at favorable rates)

leases.measurement: IBR-based present value; no implicit rates in leases

variable_interest_entities.policy: Consolidated when primary beneficiary (power to direct + obligation to absorb losses/right to receive benefits)
variable_interest_entities.key_vie: Entity owning Unlimited Vacation Club business — VIE in which Hyatt holds variable interest but is NOT primary beneficiary

legal_services.description: Partner in law firm is brother-in-law of Executive Chairman

equity_method_investments.description: Investments in entities that own/operate/manage/franchise properties

segment_information.realignment: Segments realigned in 2024 to align with business strategy
